name: sgs/buybox
title: Buybox
description: WooCommerce single-product buybox: wires the SGS option-picker pills to the shipped cart proxy engine. Renders per-axis pickers, live price row, stock status, and an accessible add-to-cart form. Falls back to core WC blocks for simple products or when WooCommerce is absent.

soldOutLabel.description: Aria-label suffix appended to pill labels when a combination is sold out. Shown to screen readers only.

unavailableLabel.description: Aria-label suffix appended to pill labels when a combination does not exist for the current selections.

notifyMeLabel.description: Label for the notify-me CTA. Notify-me capture is deferred to a future release — this label is stored now for seamless activation when it ships.

addToCartLabel.description: Override the Add to Cart button label. Empty = use the default translated string.
